message:
test(flicker_detection): add 64 edge-case tests for Severity/EventType Display, EventContext/EventDetails defaults, AnalysisStats combinations, escape_json edge cases, to_jsonl all optional fields, FlickerDetector default/incremental feed/sync-end-without-start, CSI parsing, stream boundary conditions (bd-1nz1c)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
